description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a thick, rectangular metal head with slightly rounded edges and a visibly worn striking surface. The head is dark gray, showing a textured, matte finish with some discoloration and scuff marks, indicating frequent use. The handle is made of wood, straight and cylindrical, with a natural brown color and visible grain patterns, suggesting it is solid and durable. The handle appears to be securely fitted into the head, with no visible fasteners or additional grip enhancements. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function over aesthetics, and is typical of tools found in construction, demolition, or maintenance settings. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or accessories attached to the hammer.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a dark, worn metal head and a straight wooden handle, showing signs of use and durability.
description_view_0: The hammer is viewed from the narrow side, showing the thickness of the metal head and the straight alignment of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: The hammer is seen from the broad face, highlighting the rectangular striking surface and the full width of the head.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side view emphasizes the depth of the head and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, again showing the broad striking face and the handle's attachment to the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, cylindrical, with visible wood grain and a natural finish, no ergonomic shaping or grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of steel, with flat striking faces and slightly rounded edges, no claws or peens.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible scuff marks and discoloration on the metal head, indicating use; no major chips or cracks.
